# AppTechno

> AppTechno is a software company that builds free, privacy-friendly online tools and apps. All apps run entirely in the user's browser — no uploads, no accounts required, no data stored on servers.

## What AppTechno Offers

### Available Apps

**BudgetWise** — https://budgetwise.apptechno.net
Free personal budget tracker. Track income, manage expenses, scan receipts with OCR (JPG, JPEG, PDF), plan monthly budgets, compare budget vs actual, and forecast year-end finances. Available in 6 languages. Free plan + premium ($12.99/year). Works as a PWA on Android and iOS.

**File Consolidator** — https://fileconsolidator.apptechno.net
Merge multiple CSV and Excel files into one spreadsheet. Combine PDF files and images (JPG, JPEG) into a single PDF. All processing is 100% local in the browser.

### Coming Soon

- **CV Preparation**: Build professional CVs with smart templates, export to PDF. No account required.
- **Text Tools**: Word count, character count, case converter, duplicate line remover.

## Company Values

- 100% Private: All processing in the browser — files never leave the device
- Always Free: No subscriptions, no sign-ups for core tools
- Works Everywhere: Fully responsive — desktop, tablet, mobile
- Secure: No third-party data sharing, no server-side storage

## Technology

- Static site hosted on Cloudflare Pages
- Apps built with Next.js, React, Supabase
- Supports 10 languages: English, Turkish, German, Swedish, Spanish, French, Russian, Dutch, Italian, Chinese

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://apptechno.net
- BudgetWise: https://budgetwise.apptechno.net
- File Consolidator: https://fileconsolidator.apptechno.net
- Sitemap: https://apptechno.net/sitemap.xml
